items.title: MacBook Air M1 2020 16GB
items.shortDescription: The M1 chip with 16GB RAM handles everything I throw at it. Perfect for coding, writing, and running multiple apps simultaneously.
items.description: A daily-driver laptop recommendation for coding, video editing, and heavy multitasking.
items.verdict: The machine I stop thinking about because it just keeps up.
items.whyItStayed: Fast enough for coding, writing, media, and too many browser tabs without becoming the constraint.
items.howIUseIt: Daily work, writing, builds, research, editing, and the general command center for everything digital.
items.replaced: A slower laptop that made context switching feel expensive.
items.summary: The M1 chip with 16GB RAM handles everything I throw at it. Perfect for coding, writing, and running multiple apps simultaneously.

items.title: Galaxy S23 Ultra
items.shortDescription: A big-screen Android phone with an excellent camera system, built-in S Pen, and enough battery to feel dependable all day.
items.description: A flagship Android phone recommendation for capture, notes, and everyday mobile work.
items.verdict: A phone that behaves more like a pocket workstation.
items.whyItStayed: The big screen, strong cameras, and S Pen make it useful for capturing, annotating, and doing real work away from the desk.
items.howIUseIt: Photos, quick notes, reading, navigation, travel planning, and mobile admin when opening a laptop would be overkill.
items.replaced: A smaller phone that made mobile work feel cramped.
items.summary: A big-screen Android phone with an excellent camera system, built-in S Pen, and enough battery to feel dependable all day.

items.title: Osmo Action 4
items.shortDescription: Rugged, waterproof action camera with excellent stabilization. Captures adventures without turning the moment into a production.
items.description: An action camera recommendation for travel, adventures, and POV capture.
items.verdict: The pocket camera that makes the best shots actually happen.
items.whyItStayed: Rugged, waterproof, and stabilized enough that the footage looks intentional instead of accidental.
items.howIUseIt: Adventures, travel, POV clips, and the handheld moments where a phone is not the right tool.
items.replaced: Shaky phone footage and shots I kept meaning to get but never did.
items.summary: Rugged, waterproof action camera with excellent stabilization. Captures adventures without turning the moment into a production.
